pricing.paymentNote: Note: The website currently only supports payments via Rubles. Additional payment methods (including Crypto and Global Cards) will be available in the coming days.

paymentModal.verificationDesc: First, please send the funds via Sberbank (SBP). The admin will manually review your request for security. Once approved, your subscription will be activated and you will find your License Key directly in your Profile on the website.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the OUR-FIX technical intelligence system.

questions.q: How does OUR-FIX help in technical interviews?
questions.a: Our neural engine provides real-time coding solutions and precise explanations for complex problems, putting you at the top of the candidate list.

questions.q: Is the software completely safe and undetectable?
questions.a: Yes, our stealth protocol programmatically renames the process in Task Manager and encrypts transmissions to ensure your full privacy.

questions.q: What programming languages does the system support?
questions.a: The system supports all modern programming languages including Python, Java, JavaScript, C++, C#, Go, and many more.

activation.title: Activation & Operational Guide
activation.subtitle: Follow these tactical steps to unlock your full potential and bypass system restrictions.

steps.title: Identity Establishment
steps.desc: Create your personal account on this website first as a fundamental first step.

steps.title: System Sync
steps.desc: Use the same registration data to log into the software after installation.

steps.title: Bypassing Defenses
steps.desc: If Windows warnings appear, do not worry. The software programmatically changes its name in Task Manager to remain stealthy from process monitoring tools.

steps.title: Data Transmission
steps.desc: Send your registration data to the owner on Telegram for identity verification.

steps.title: Transfer Protocol
steps.desc: Upon verification, the owner will send the payment details to complete your subscription.

steps.title: Key Injection
steps.desc: You will receive a unique Activation Key for your tier, which will enable the full software power.
